user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Humongous Insurance.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 08:51 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Humongous Insurance

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 13:57 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 11:28 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Humongous Insurance partner engagement

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Humongous Insurance
Date: 2024-01-07
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance), David Chen (Microsoft), Priya (Humongous Insurance)

[00:02:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:08:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:10:00] Priya (Humongous Insurance): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:14:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:19:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:21:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:26:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:29:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:32:00] Priya (Humongous Insurance): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:35:00] David Chen (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:39:00] Michael Petrov (Humongous Insurance): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
